calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Phil Kilduff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of America.
No appearance by the Defendant: David L.Lloyd.
Exhibit 1- Affidavit in lieu of live testimony------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $2,905.00
Interest $295.25
Attorneys' Fees $726.25
Costs $229.00, for a Total of $4,155.50
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2007 Set For Trial On Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
